text.title: Embedding Generation Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from model pin to validated embedding service.

step.name: pin-model-and-version
step.action: Pin model_name + model_version. Validate provider rate-limit cap.

step.name: wire-batching
step.action: Batch with provider cap. Sort OpenAI response by `item.index`.

step.name: normalize-and-guard
step.action: Normalize to unit length for cosine; reject empty/whitespace/overlong texts; skip near-zero norm vectors.
